description: DATABASE requires exclusive access during schema changes
TEST_ENV requires exclusive access during testing
BACKEND_DEV cannot deploy or test code until DB_ADMIN migration is complete
Migration done channel from DB_ADMIN to BACKEND_DEV confirms schema is ready
Tests pass or fail; failure may require DB_ADMIN to adjust migration
DB schema migration must complete before BACKEND_DEV code deployment and testing
Test failure triggers revision loop: fix -> potentially re-migrate -> re-test
DB_ADMIN needs DATABASE during migration; TESTER needs TEST_ENV during testing
